description: Incidents related to users being unable to login to the banking system.
Incidents related to server not responding or being unavailable.
Incidents related to password reset requests and issues.
Incidents related to API errors in the banking system.
Incidents related to failed transactions in the banking system.
Incidents related to report download failures in the banking system.
Incidents related to permission denials in the banking system.
Incidents related to application performance issues, such as slow or unresponsive applications.
rules: Title contains 'Application not opening' or 'Application slow'

description: Incidents related to report download failures in the banking system.
